item.title: India Ramps Up AI Infrastructure Investment With $200 Billion Target
item.description: At the India AI Impact Summit, industry leaders made commitments collectively aiming to invest over $200 billion in AI infrastructure over the coming ...

item.title: A New Update About ‘The Night Agent’ Season 4 Renewal, Release Date
item.description: The Night Agent season 4 is almost certainly coming, and we already know about its potential release date based on new information.

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Saturday, February 21
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Making LLMs Smart With Transformers: It’s A Really Big Deal
item.description: The transformer did a lot for the LLM, but even better architectures are coming.

item.title: PayPal Confirms Data Breach — Money Stolen, Passwords Reset
item.description: PayPal has confirmed a breach that exposed personal information to a hacker. Are you affected? What data was exposed?
